title: Hierarchy of Sub-graphs
description: A visual representation of a main graph and its various types of sub-graphs, showing the relationships and containment between them.
elements: Main Graph G (with vertices V(G) and edges E(G))
Induced Sub-graph (Contains all edges of G connecting vertices in V(H))
relationships: Main Graph G contains all other elements
Sub-graph H is a general case contained within G
Spanning Sub-graph is a special type of Sub-graph
Induced Sub-graph is defined by its vertex set
Vertex/Edge-deleted Sub-graphs are formed by removal operations
